'''Rian Rann''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and a high-ranking member of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]].<ref name="AIR" />

A member of the [[Sullustan Home Guard/Legends|Sullustan Home Guard]] up to his expulsion on [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he then joined Mytaranor [[Slavery/Legends|Slaving]] Council as the main [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]] of the Council's mobile headquarters, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Prison ship/Legends|Dungeon ship]] [[Vanquisher (Kiltirin-class)|''Vanquisher'']]. In little [[Time/Legends|time]], he became the master pilot of the ''Vanquisher'', a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] he loved as if it was his own. He hired three skilled [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] technicians only to maintain the ship, a task they performed while aided by [[R2-K7]].<ref name="AIR" />

Rann was a qualmless slaver, [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] the prisoners who did not obey his every command.<ref name="AIR" />
